reasoning: Koren, today's focus is on improving your lactate clearance and building your aerobic base. Comparing your 5-min and 20-min power drop, we need to work on fatigue resistance. Our goal is to support your upcoming effort on the Alpine Loop, targeting a sustained power output on the key climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10 min: 6 min at 201-218W, followed by 4 min at 242-256W to simulate Alpine Over-Unders

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
